◎简　　介  

　　Iqbal wakes up one morning to the news of Aunt Fatwa being announced the Guardian of the Jewel - an Indian honorary title. Eager to get out of school Iqbal convinces his father to bring the whole family to India to celebrate and take part in the ceremony with Aunt Fatwa.
